response.step_by_step_log: I identified the first song as 'セカイの向こうに' from the on-screen text and the second song as 'トレビアンナイト' from the on-screen text in the second section. For the second song, I found references to Shirogane Noel, but no comprehensive, verified lyric source was readily available for either in the format required. I will structure the JSON accordingly.
response.global_summary: The video is a concert performance featuring three virtual idols (Shirogane Noel, Usada Pekora, and Houshou Marine) performing a medley of two songs, followed by a solo performance by Shirogane Noel.
